headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Marathon Petroleum, Raises Price Target to $210
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Betty Zhang   maintains Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $174 to $210.
